title: 20-inch Christmas Wreath Green Olive Leaf Red Berry Bow Bell Wreath Christmas Front Door Corridor Fireplace Courtyard Decoration Winter Party Office Home Decoration
features: Exquisite design:This Christmas wreath has an outer diameter of approximately 20 inches and combines vibrant green olive leaves with bright red berries, perfectly showcasing the festive atmosphere and adding warmth and joy to your home

Unique decoration:In the center of the garland, there is a red and black checkered bow and a refreshing bell, which not only adds visual depth but also brings a cheerful ringtone, creating a strong festive atmosphere and becoming a beautiful sight right at your doorstep

High-quality materials:We carefully select premium olive leaves and durable berries to ensure that the Christmas wreath remains beautiful for a long time.It can be used both indoors and outdoors and is highly favored for home or party decoration

Multi-purpose application:This Christmas wreath is not only suitable as a welcome decoration at the door, but also an excellent accessory for Christmas parties, family dinners or festival celebrations, helping you create a warm festive atmosphere

Excellent after-sales guarantee:We promise to provide high-quality customer service.If you have any questions about the products, please feel free to contact our customer service at any time.We are dedicated to resolving your doubts and ensuring your satisfaction with every shopping experience
